fault_hypothesis: The overlap detection logic on line 70 is incorrect. It uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`) which fails to detect intervals that are adjacent (touching at the boundaries), treating them as non-overlapping.

spec.expr: (end__1 <= s or start__1 >= e) == (end__1 < s or start__1 > e)

constraints.intent: The buggy overlap check should be equivalent to the correct check with strict inequalities.
At the end of each loop iteration, the new interval must not overlap with the current existing interval.

spec.expr: all((interval[1] < s or interval[0] > e) for s, e in existing)

constraints.intent: If the schedule is updated, the new interval must not have had a boundary overlap with any existing interval.

spec.expr: (__cbfl_result[0] == True) implies all(__cbfl_result[1][i][1] < __cbfl_result[1][i+1][0] for i in range(len(__cbfl_result[1]) - 1))

constraints.intent: If a reservation is accepted, the resulting schedule must not contain any overlapping or adjacent intervals.
